scope: completed P0/P1 wave plus P2 special-feature inventory and isolated In-Memory OLTP, Temporal Tables, Service Broker, Full-Text and Data Capture/Replication deep analyses

inMemoryOltpTsqlParse.note: Static parser validation only; this is not SQL Server compilation or execution evidence.

temporalTsqlParse.note: Static parser validation only; this is not SQL Server compilation or execution evidence.

temporalReadOnlyContract.note: The module reads visible catalogs and approximate partition statistics only; it does not claim overlap freedom, cleanup success or recognition of disconnected former pairs.

serviceBrokerTsqlParse.note: Static parser validation only; this is not SQL Server compilation or execution evidence.

serviceBrokerReadOnlyContract.note: The module reads only visible configuration and aggregated operational metadata. Disabled RECEIVE is reported as review evidence and never as proof of a poison message.

fullTextTsqlParse.note: Static parser validation only; this is not SQL Server compilation or execution evidence.

fullTextReadOnlyContract.note: The module reads only visible catalogs and aggregated current Full-Text runtime metadata. Empty DMVs are not treated as history, and thresholds do not trigger DDL.

dataCaptureTsqlParse.note: Static parser validation only; this is not SQL Server compilation or execution evidence.

dataCaptureReadOnlyContract.note: CT loss requires an explicit consumer watermark; scheduled CDC and remote Distributor limitations are preserved, and accessible source subsets remain valid.

repositoryPrivacyGate.note: The gate applies to repository and downloadable artifacts only; runtime resultsets and OUTPUT values are unchanged. The reviewed CI patterns create one ephemeral random password at job runtime and reference it through environment variables; no credential value is persisted in the repository or as an artifact.

testDocumentation.claim: No installation, compilation, smoke, functional, permission, load or cross-version runtime execution is claimed for this release wave.

runtimeLimitations: No SQL Server endpoint or sqlcmd runtime was available in the implementation environment.
PowerShell was unavailable, so the standalone installer build was inspected statically but not executed.

The parent release documents a synthetic SQL Server 2022 Linux installer and twelve-suite run for the scope through 1.1.0-special.6; it does not include SC-018 or SC-019 and is not runtime evidence for this release.
